nodes.name: .dockerignore
nodes.summary: Docker build context exclusion list for the review-events cron service, preventing unnecessary files from being sent to the Docker daemon.

nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Minimal Alpine-based Docker image for the review-events cron job, which invokes cron-runner.sh on a schedule to trigger the Supabase edge function that processes and reviews pending family events.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses alpine:3.23 with only curl and ca-certificates added; the entrypoint delegates to a shared cron-runner.sh script parameterized by a PROCESS_ environment variable.
